Start free: Coffee with Quinta
← The Practice

The Practice

Module 2 — Build your AI assistant

Go from chatting with Claude to building an assistant that handles a real, repeatable task in your business.

90 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • Moving from chatting to a repeatable assistant
  • Giving Claude the context of your business
  • Automating one real, recurring task

What you'll walk out with

An AI assistant that handles a real task in your business.

Know before you go

Comfortable with the Module 1 basics. A Claude Pro subscription is recommended.

See dates & book

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Module 2 — Build your AI assistant for?

Women founders whose business is up and running and who want to strengthen this part of it. It's part of The Practice, the hands-on AI track — no technical background needed.

2

Do I need any experience?

Comfortable with the Module 1 basics. A Claude Pro subscription is recommended.

3

What will I walk out with?

An AI assistant that handles a real task in your business. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

It's open now — 90 minutes · live, small group. Dates and booking are right on this page.

Quinta & Co.

Practical business & AI education · Dallas, Texas & online
